004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http;
018
019import org.apache.juneau.http.response.*;
020
021/**
022 * Static factory methods for creating pre-defined HTTP response and exception objects.
023 *
024 * <p>
025 * Import statically for clean DSL-style usage in REST server code:
026 * <p class='bjava'>
027 *    import static HttpResponses.*;
028 *
029 *    <ja>@RestGet</ja>(<js>"/users/{id}"</js>)
030 *    <jk>public</jk> User getUser(<ja>@Path</ja> String id) {
031 *       User <jv>user</jv> = userService.find(id);
032 *       <jk>if</jk> (<jv>user</jv> == <jk>null</jk>) <jk>throw</jk> notFound(<js>"User not found: "</js> + id);
033 *       <jk>return</jk> <jv>user</jv>;
034 *    }
035 * </p>
036 *
037 * <p>
038 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
039 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
040 * It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the <b>next major</b> Juneau release
041 * (and possibly earlier).
042 *
043 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
044 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
045 * </ul>
046 *
047 * @since 9.2.1
048 */
049@SuppressWarnings({
050   "java:S1192" // Duplicate string literals are HTTP response reason phrases and status labels; intentional
051})
052public final class HttpResponses {
053
054   private HttpResponses() {}
055
056   // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
057   // 1xx Informational
058   // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
059
060   /** @return A new {@code 100 Continue} response. */
061   public static Continue continueResponse() { return new Continue(); }
062
063   /** @return A new {@code 101 Switching Protocols} response. */
064   public static SwitchingProtocols switchingProtocols() { return new SwitchingProtocols(); }
065
066   // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
067   // 2xx Success
068   // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
069
070   /** @return A new {@code 200 OK} response. */
071   public static Ok ok() { return new Ok(); }
072
073   /** @param body The response body. @return A new {@code 200 OK} response. */
074   public static Ok ok(String body) { return new Ok(body); }
075
076   /** @return A new {@code 201 Created} response. */
077   public static Created created() { return new Created(); }
078
079   /** @param body The response body. @return A new {@code 201 Created} response. */
080   public static Created created(String body) { return new Created(body); }
081
082   /** @return A new {@code 202 Accepted} response. */
083   public static Accepted accepted() { return new Accepted(); }
084
085   /** @return A new {@code 204 No Content} response. */
086   public static NoContent noContent() { return new NoContent(); }
087
088   /** @return A new {@code 206 Partial Content} response. */
089   public static PartialContent partialContent() { return new PartialContent(); }
090
091   // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
092   // 3xx Redirection
093   // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
094
095   /** @param location The redirect location. @return A new {@code 301 Moved Permanently} response. */
096   public static BasicHttpResponse movedPermanently(String location) { return new MovedPermanently().withHeader("Location", location); }
097
098   /** @param location The redirect location. @return A new {@code 302 Found} response. */
099   public static BasicHttpResponse found(String location) { return new Found().withHeader("Location", location); }
100
101   /** @param location The redirect location. @return A new {@code 303 See Other} response. */
102   public static BasicHttpResponse seeOther(String location) { return new SeeOther().withHeader("Location", location); }
103
104   /** @return A new {@code 304 Not Modified} response. */
105   public static NotModified notModified() { return new NotModified(); }
106
107   /** @param location The redirect location. @return A new {@code 307 Temporary Redirect} response. */
108   public static BasicHttpResponse temporaryRedirect(String location) { return new TemporaryRedirect().withHeader("Location", location); }
109
110   /** @param location The redirect location. @return A new {@code 308 Permanent Redirect} response. */
111   public static BasicHttpResponse permanentRedirect(String location) { return new PermanentRedirect().withHeader("Location", location); }
112
113   // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
114   // 4xx Client Errors
115   // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
116
117   /** @return A new {@code 400 Bad Request} exception. */
118   public static BadRequest badRequest() { return new BadRequest(); }
119
120   /** @param message The error message. @return A new {@code 400 Bad Request} exception. */
121   public static BadRequest badRequest(String message) { return new BadRequest(message); }
122
123   /** @return A new {@code 401 Unauthorized} exception. */
124   public static Unauthorized unauthorized() { return new Unauthorized(); }
125
126   /** @param message The error message. @return A new {@code 401 Unauthorized} exception. */
127   public static Unauthorized unauthorized(String message) { return new Unauthorized(message); }
128
129   /** @return A new {@code 403 Forbidden} exception. */
130   public static Forbidden forbidden() { return new Forbidden(); }
131
132   /** @param message The error message. @return A new {@code 403 Forbidden} exception. */
133   public static Forbidden forbidden(String message) { return new Forbidden(message); }
134
135   /** @return A new {@code 404 Not Found} exception. */
136   public static NotFound notFound() { return new NotFound(); }
137
138   /** @param message The error message. @return A new {@code 404 Not Found} exception. */
139   public static NotFound notFound(String message) { return new NotFound(message); }
140
141   /** @return A new {@code 405 Method Not Allowed} exception. */
142   public static MethodNotAllowed methodNotAllowed() { return new MethodNotAllowed(); }
143
144   /** @return A new {@code 409 Conflict} exception. */
145   public static Conflict conflict() { return new Conflict(); }
146
147   /** @param message The error message. @return A new {@code 409 Conflict} exception. */
148   public static Conflict conflict(String message) { return new Conflict(message); }
149
150   /** @return A new {@code 410 Gone} exception. */
151   public static Gone gone() { return new Gone(); }
152
153   /** @return A new {@code 412 Precondition Failed} exception. */
154   public static PreconditionFailed preconditionFailed() { return new PreconditionFailed(); }
155
156   /** @return A new {@code 415 Unsupported Media Type} exception. */
157   public static UnsupportedMediaType unsupportedMediaType() { return new UnsupportedMediaType(); }
158
159   /** @param message The error message. @return A new {@code 415 Unsupported Media Type} exception. */
160   public static UnsupportedMediaType unsupportedMediaType(String message) { return new UnsupportedMediaType(message); }
161
162   /** @return A new {@code 422 Unprocessable Entity} exception. */
163   public static UnprocessableEntity unprocessableEntity() { return new UnprocessableEntity(); }
164
165   /** @param message The error message. @return A new {@code 422 Unprocessable Entity} exception. */
166   public static UnprocessableEntity unprocessableEntity(String message) { return new UnprocessableEntity(message); }
167
168   /** @return A new {@code 429 Too Many Requests} exception. */
169   public static TooManyRequests tooManyRequests() { return new TooManyRequests(); }
170
171   // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
172   // 5xx Server Errors
173   // ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
174
175   /** @return A new {@code 500 Internal Server Error} exception. */
176   public static InternalServerError internalServerError() { return new InternalServerError(); }
177
178   /** @param message The error message. @return A new {@code 500 Internal Server Error} exception. */
179   public static InternalServerError internalServerError(String message) { return new InternalServerError(message); }
180
181   /** @param cause The cause. @return A new {@code 500 Internal Server Error} exception. */
182   public static InternalServerError internalServerError(Throwable cause) { return new InternalServerError(cause); }
183
184   /** @return A new {@code 501 Not Implemented} exception. */
185   public static NotImplemented notImplemented() { return new NotImplemented(); }
186
187   /** @return A new {@code 503 Service Unavailable} exception. */
188   public static ServiceUnavailable serviceUnavailable() { return new ServiceUnavailable(); }
189
190   /** @param message The error message. @return A new {@code 503 Service Unavailable} exception. */
191   public static ServiceUnavailable serviceUnavailable(String message) { return new ServiceUnavailable(message); }
192}
